title: centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa
intro: Centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa, commonly known as the scabiosa, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
